description.message: A beautiful new tab page with clock, search, apps, and todo list

todoReminderTitle.description: Title for the todo reminder notification

todoReminderMessage.description: Notification body for todo reminder. $1$ is the task text, $2$ is the due date display.

bgRotation.description: Section header for background rotation settings

bgRotationToggle.description: Label for the background rotation toggle

bgRotationInterval.description: Label for the rotation interval selector

bgRotationPicker.description: Label for the background picker in rotation settings

bgRotationNext.description: Button to manually advance to next background

shortcuts.description: Label for the shortcuts settings tab

keyboardShortcuts.description: Heading for the keyboard shortcuts settings section

keyboardShortcutsDesc.message: Customize keyboard shortcuts for quick actions
keyboardShortcutsDesc.description: Description text for the keyboard shortcuts section

resetToDefaults.description: Label for the reset shortcuts button

resetShortcuts.description: Button text to reset shortcuts to defaults

shortcutFocusSearch.description: Label for the focus search shortcut action

shortcutOpenSettings.description: Label for the open settings shortcut action

shortcutToggleSimpleMode.description: Label for the toggle simple mode shortcut action

shortcutToggleTodo.description: Label for the toggle todo list shortcut action

shortcutToggleNotes.description: Label for the toggle notes shortcut action

shortcutCloseModal.description: Label for the close modal shortcut action

shortcutPressAKey.description: Prompt shown when rebinding a keyboard shortcut

pomodoroEnabled.description: Label for the pomodoro enable toggle

pomodoroShortBreakDuration.description: Label for short break duration setting

pomodoroLongBreakDuration.description: Label for long break duration setting

pomodoroSessionsBeforeLong.description: Label for sessions before long break setting

pomodoroStartFocus.description: Tooltip for the start focus button on a todo item

pomodoroEnd.description: Tooltip for the end session button

pomodoroWorkCompleteTitle.description: Notification title when work session ends

pomodoroWorkCompleteMessage.message: Time for a break! $1$ sessions completed.
pomodoroWorkCompleteMessage.description: Notification body when work session ends. $1$ is the number of sessions completed.

pomodoroShortBreakCompleteTitle.description: Notification title when short break ends

pomodoroShortBreakCompleteMessage.description: Notification body when short break ends

pomodoroLongBreakCompleteTitle.description: Notification title when long break ends

pomodoroLongBreakCompleteMessage.description: Notification body when long break ends. $1$ is the number of sessions completed.
